title: Doctor Who: Weeping Angels
body: # Weeping Angels Mod ![Weeping Angels logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Suff99/Weeping-Angels/1.16/src/main/resources/logo.png) Weeping Angels is a Minecraft mod that adds the iconic creatures from Doctor Who to the game. This mod was originally created by a_dizzle for Minecraft 1.5.2, and this version is a tribute to that original mod. ## Features - Weeping Angels will teleport you to a random location in a random dimension, including dimensions added by other mods and data packs. - The Timey Wimey detector item will alert you when there are angels nearby. - The mod is fully compatible with Vivecraft. - Weeping Angels can only be damaged with a pickaxe or zapped out of existence with a Chronodyne generator. - The mod is fully configurable, so you can customize its behaviour to your liking. ## Installation 1. Make sure you have [Minecraft Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/) or [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) installed. 2. Download the latest version of the mod from the [releases](https://modrinth.com/mod/weeping-angels/versions) page. 3. Drag and drop the downloaded `.jar` file into the `mods` folder located in your Minecraft directory. ## Configuration To configure the mod, open the `config/weeping_angels-common.toml` / `config/weeping_angels-client.toml` file located in your Minecraft directory. From here, you can customize the behaviour of Weeping Angels, including whether or not they can teleport players between dimensions. ## Bug Reports If you encounter any issues while using this mod, please report them [here](https://github.com/Suff99/Weeping-Angels/issues). ## License This mod is licensed under the AGPL License. See the [LICENSE](https://github.com/Suff99/Weeping-Angels/blob/architectury/1.19/LICENSE) file for more details. ## Server Sponsership
